[category]
matching
[prompt]
In Alice's Wonderland, secret processing rules are used on text.

x: not matched anywhere
y: matched but wrong position

0 11011111 7
1 10111101 6
2 01111101 6
3 11111111 a
4 10111111 7
5 11110101 6
6 10000100 2
7 11011111 7

01 10 11010101 5
12 21 11011111 7 match 0 7
23 32 11011111 7 match 0 7
34 43 10111101 6 match 1
45 54 01111101 6 match 2
56 65 11111111 a match 3
67 76 10111111 7 match 4
70 07 11110101 6 match 5

02 20 11011111 7 match 0 7
13 31 10001101 4
24 42 11111111 a match 3
35 53 11101001 5
46 64 10111111 7 match 4
57 75 01101100 4
60 06 11111111 a match 3
71 17 10100100 3

03 30 11011001 5
14 41 10111101 6 match 1
25 52 11111111 a match 3
36 63 10111111 7 match 4
47 74 00111101 5
50 05 11111001 6
61 16 10111111 7 match 4
72 27 11111111 a match 3

04 40 11111101 7
15 51 11101100 5
26 62 11111111 a match 3
37 73 10101101 5
